description: eCrimeX (eCX) integration settings for the SSI scam-site investigator. Controls API access to the APWG eCrimeX data clearinghouse for enrichment (Phase 1), submission (Phase 2), and polling (Phase 3).

fields.description: Enable eCX integration. When false, all eCX enrichment, submission, and polling are skipped.
APWG eCrimeX API key. Required for all eCX operations. Store in Secret Manager (GCP) or .env.local — never commit to source.
eCX API base URL. Default is the sandbox. Set to https://api.ecrimex.net/api/v1 for production.
Attribution string sent with eCX API requests (identifies the submitting organisation).
HTTP timeout (seconds) for eCX API requests.
Enable enrichment queries during passive recon. Requires ecx.enabled=true and a valid API key.
Enable submission of investigation findings to eCX. Safety gate 1 of 2. Both submission_enabled and submission_agreement_signed must be true.
Confirm APWG data sharing agreement is executed. Safety gate 2 of 2. Set true only after the agreement is in place.
Risk score threshold for automatic submission to eCX. Scores >= this value are auto-submitted; below this value, indicators are queued for analyst review (if >= queue_threshold).
Risk score threshold for queuing submissions for analyst review. Scores >= this value but below auto_submit_threshold are queued. Scores below this value are skipped.
Time-to-live (hours) for cached eCX enrichment results before re-query.
Path to the JSON file mapping SSI token symbols to eCX currency codes.
Enable inbound polling for new eCX records. Runs as a Cloud Run Job or via CLI.
eCX modules to poll for new records. Valid values: phish, malicious-domain, malicious-ip, cryptocurrency-addresses.
Polling cadence in minutes. Used by Cloud Scheduler to trigger the poller job.
Minimum confidence score for polled records. Records below this threshold are filtered out.
When true, automatically trigger SSI investigations for new phish records that pass filtering and deduplication. When false, records are logged only.
Brand allowlist for polling. Only records matching these brands are processed. Empty list means all brands are accepted.
TLD allowlist for polling. Only records with domains matching these TLDs are processed. Empty list means all TLDs are accepted.
